comments: rebuild compiler with patched source (gc/main.go now includes xgo_patch.Patch())

GO_BYPASS_XGO prevents the instrumented go binary's xgoPrecheck hook from delegating back to xgo, which would cause recursive instrumentation failures (e.g. undefined src.NoXPos_xgo_get on Linux or GOTOOLCHAIN version mismatch). See doc/development/WHY_DOUBLE_SETUP_EVER_FAILED.md.

rebuild all standard library .a files from patched source. Without this, Go reuses pre-compiled pkg/ files from the original GOROOT which lack XgoRegister/XgoTrap. The old programmatic path (V1_0_0) avoids this by passing -a to go test, forcing recompilation at test time.
GO_BYPASS_XGO prevents the instrumented go binary's xgoPrecheck hook from delegating back to xgo.
rebuild the go command with the xgoPrecheck hook (xgo_main.go)
